creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm not seeing this, so if you are building your own packages, try rebuilding dbus (with X11 option on), dbus-glib, pydbus-common, and py38-dbus.

You can also disable hp-systray by creating .config/autostart/hplip-systray.desktop in your home directory with the following two lines:

[Desktop Entry]
Hidden=true
